🕉️ Shaivite Temples and Sites – Kashmir & Surrounding Regions
Saka, Surya, Agni, Indra, Mitra, and Varuna Sites

For Agni, Indra, Mitra, and Varuna: No major standalone archaeological sites or temples are known. Their worship is attested in Vedic texts, iconography, and inscriptions within multi-deity temples, but not as the primary focus of monumental architecture.
Kashmir Smast is included for its evidence of multi-deity worship, including Surya and other Vedic deities, in addition to its primary Shaivite significance124.
